note: Future-tense milestone tied to a now-past target year (2019). Genuine stale candidate.
Forward funding request tied to a now-past fiscal year (2022); no leading dateline. Genuine stale candidate (scores higher than the CPS-2025 entry, so it belongs in gold).

sentenceSubstring: smaller radars in the Pacific will
note: Negative (historical dateline narration): 'In July 2011, a ... spokesman explained that ... will "pick up the slack"'. The year is the dateline of a 2011 statement, not a forward target; suppressed by the dateline rule (Rule 1). NB the quotation rule (Rule 2) does NOT fire here — the marker 'will' sits OUTSIDE the quoted span 'pick up the slack'.
Negative (historical month-dateline narration): 'In March 2013, the Obama administration announced plans to add 14 interceptors...'. Frame year 2013 == claim year; suppressed.

sentenceSubstring: announced plans to name the first ship of the class Zumwalt
note: Negative (historical month-dateline narration): 'In April 2006, the Navy announced plans to name...'. Suppressed by the dateline rule.

sentenceSubstring: no plans to continue the project
note: Negative (historical bare-year dateline, negated plan): 'In 2021, ... ceased with no plans to continue the project.'. Suppressed by the dateline rule.

sentenceSubstring: revealed plans to reduce the procurement rate in 2016
note: Negative (historical month-dateline narration): 'In August 2013, the USN revealed plans to reduce the procurement rate in 2016.'. Suppression depends on detect.ts choosing the EARLIEST past year (2013 == the dateline frame year); if year-selection ever changed to prefer the later target (2016), Rule 1 would no longer fire and this TN would flip to a false positive. The composition guard + this note keep that dependency visible (see DET-1).

sentenceSubstring: As of January 2026, in light of China's expanding fleet
note: Negative (year gate): 'As of January 2026, ... the Navy had canceled plans to retire seven LCS hulls and will keep a fleet of 28.'. Year 2026 is not past relative to asOfYear 2026; never flagged.
